{{Infobox group
| name = Damascan
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Damascan soldiers]] wear uniforms.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6">''House of Blades'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Damascan soldiers]] are considered extensions of [[Zakareth]]'s will.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14">''House of Blades'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] has no consideration for the safety of the [[Damascan]] people.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Damascan]] military is characterized by discipline.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c1">''City of Light'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
